name: ERPNext Stock V2 Retail Exchange Fee Test

parameters.dataJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ customer_name: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.customerName, customer_type: "Company", customer_group: "Individual", territory: "Vietnam" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ item_group_name: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.itemGroup, parent_item_group: "All Item Groups", is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.sellWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.parentWarehouse, company: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.returnWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.parentWarehouse, company: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.productA, item_name: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.productA, item_group: $('Create Exchange Item Group').first().json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 1, valuation_rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateA, standard_rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateA }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.productB, item_name: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.productB, item_group: $('Create Exchange Item Group').first().json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 1, valuation_rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateB, standard_rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateB }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.feeItem, item_name: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.feeItem, item_group: $('Create Exchange Item Group').first().json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 0, is_purchase_item: 0, is_sales_item: 1, standard_rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.feeRate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Receipt", company: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.postingDate, items: [{ item_code: $('Create Product A').first().json.name, t_warehouse: $('Create Exchange Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.receiptQtyA, basic_rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateA }, { item_code: $('Create Product B').first().json.name, t_warehouse: $('Create Exchange Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.receiptQtyB, basic_rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateB }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $('Create Exchange Customer').first().json.name, company: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.postingDate, due_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.dueDate, update_stock: 1, set_warehouse: $('Create Exchange Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, debit_to: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.accounts.receivable, items: [{ item_code: $('Create Product A').first().json.name, warehouse: $('Create Exchange Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.saleQtyA, rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateA, income_account: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.accounts.sales }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $('Create Exchange Customer').first().json.name, company: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.postingDate, due_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.dueDate, update_stock: 1, is_return: 1, return_against: $('Submit Original Sale A').first().json.name, set_warehouse: $('Create Exchange Return Warehouse').first().json.name, debit_to: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.accounts.receivable, items: [{ item_code: $('Create Product A').first().json.name, warehouse: $('Create Exchange Return Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: -$('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.returnQtyA, rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateA, income_account: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.accounts.sales }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $('Create Exchange Customer').first().json.name, company: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.postingDate, due_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.dueDate, update_stock: 0, debit_to: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.accounts.receivable, items: [{ item_code: $('Create Exchange Fee Item').first().json.name, qty: 1, rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.feeRate, income_account: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.accounts.sales }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $('Create Exchange Customer').first().json.name, company: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.postingDate, due_date: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.dueDate, update_stock: 1, set_warehouse: $('Create Exchange Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, debit_to: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.accounts.receivable, items: [{ item_code: $('Create Product B').first().json.name, warehouse: $('Create Exchange Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.exchangeQtyB, rate: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.rateB, income_account: $('Build Exchange Fee Context').first().json.accounts.sales }] }) }}
